task_updates.executor_notes: Added `docs/runbook-payments.md` as the operator runbook covering the six required non-happy-path scenarios: `manual_hold`, `failed`, ghost-verified wallet, admin DM undelivered, RPC down / `rpc_unreachable`, and budget cap hit. The document includes the requested `/payment-resolve`-first decision flow, admin-chat retry/release guidance, the copy-paste SQL appendix sourced from `scripts/audit_ghost_confirmed_payments.py`, and an explicit scheduler section marked as an operator decision with Railway, GitHub Actions, and external-scheduler options. Verification: heading/keyword checks confirmed the required sections and scheduler language, and the full pytest suite passed after the doc landed (`160 passed, 2 warnings`).
commands_run: rg -n "^## Scenario:|OPERATOR DECISION|Railway Cron|GitHub Actions Scheduled Workflow|External Scheduler|admin alert undeliverable|/payment-resolve" docs/runbook-payments.md
